scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:behavior && npm run test:agent
scripts.test:behavior: tsc tests/record-events.test.ts tests/record-input.test.ts tests/ledger-recording.test.ts tests/ledger-stats.test.ts tests/ledger-state.test.ts tests/time.test.ts tests/state.test.ts lib/event-recording.ts lib/record-input.ts lib/ledger-recording.ts lib/ledger-stats.ts lib/ledger-state.ts lib/types.ts lib/time.ts lib/state.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --outDir /tmp/timely-cjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict && node --test /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/record-events.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/record-input.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/ledger-recording.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/ledger-stats.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/ledger-state.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/time.test.js /tmp/timely-cjs/tests/state.test.js
scripts.test:agent: tsc tests/record-workflow.test.ts tests/query-workflow.test.ts tests/app-workflow.test.ts tests/ui-popup.test.ts tests/eval-record-workflow.test.ts scripts/eval-record-workflow.ts lib/agent/record-workflow.ts lib/agent/query-workflow.ts lib/agent/app-workflow.ts lib/ui-popup.ts lib/event-recording.ts lib/record-input.ts lib/ledger-recording.ts lib/types.ts lib/time.ts lib/state.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --outDir .timely-test/agent-cjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict && node --test .timely-test/agent-cjs/tests/record-workflow.test.js .timely-test/agent-cjs/tests/query-workflow.test.js .timely-test/agent-cjs/tests/app-workflow.test.js .timely-test/agent-cjs/tests/ui-popup.test.js .timely-test/agent-cjs/tests/eval-record-workflow.test.js
